phase: Phase 5 — Import/export + KeePassXC-CLI roundtrip-oracle + admin-CSV-audit-export + account-pw-reset LIVE
kdf_in_use: AES-KDF (KDBX-spec-conform, opent in KeePassXC-desktop, geverifieerd via KeePassXC-CLI oracle in CI). Argon2id-default deferred naar v1.0-Bernstein.

mfa.magic_link: 32-byte urlsafe token, 10 min, single-use via Gmail SMTP_SSL
mfa.secret_at_rest: AES-GCM-encrypted (12-byte nonce + ciphertext + tag) met HORSESAFE_TOTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY

account_security.pw_change: POST /auth/password — vereist oude-pw-verificatie + nieuwe-pw min 12 chars

next_version_planned: 0.0.6-Adleman (Phase 6 — sharing tussen users met re-encryptie + asymmetrische key-pair per user)
